name: such-skills
description: A collection of useful Claude Code skills and plugins built by Raj Nandan Sharma.

plugins.name: image-manipulation
plugins.description: Image manipulation tools: PNG-to-SVG vector conversion, platform-aware image resizing for 60+ presets, and lossless image format conversion (PNG, JPG, WebP, TIFF, BMP, GIF, HEIC, AVIF).

plugins.name: svelte-coding
plugins.description: Svelte development tools: shadcn-svelte component detection and documentation for building accessible UIs in SvelteKit projects.
